cache._maxEntrySizeComment: 50MB — single entries larger than this are never cached, preventing one large video from evicting everything

stealth._comment: injectViaHeader=false means no Via header is added to upstream requests. exposeDebugHeaders=false means no x-edgeproxy headers on responses. Both protect against ad-network fingerprinting.

memory._maxHotBlobBytesComment: 256MB LRU in-memory hot cache for recently-served blobs
memory._preloadBlobsComment: Set true to pre-warm hot cache from disk on startup (slower init, faster first hit)

concurrency._indexFlushDebounceMsComment: Wait 2s after last write before persisting index to disk. BUG 3 fix: was silently ignored in v5.
concurrency._ipcPollMsComment: Every 5s, check if another process has updated the index (IPC via index-version.json). BUG 5 fix.
concurrency._staleCleanupMsComment: Every 30min, remove entries older than staleTTL from index. Prevents unbounded growth.

logging.description: 0=silent, 1=error, 2=warn, 3=info, 4=debug+file. Zero console output at all levels.
